summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The HistoryViewer class is used to parse and view the JobHistory files. It can print the job/task/attempt summary information in human-readable format or machine-readable JSON format.

CORE LOGIC:
The class uses the JobHistoryParser class to parse the history file and store the job information in the JobInfo object. It then uses the HistoryViewerPrinter class to print the job/task/attempt summary information in the specified format.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The class takes the fully qualified Path of the History File and the Configuration file as inputs. It prints the job/task/attempt summary information to the PrintStream.

DEPENDENCIES:
The class depends on the JobHistoryParser, HistoryViewerPrinter, and other classes for parsing and printing the job history information.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This code provides a way to print a human-readable summary of a job's history.

CORE LOGIC:
The code contains methods for printing job details, task summaries, job analysis, and task attempts.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The code takes a JobHistoryParser.JobInfo object as input and prints the job history to a PrintStream.

DEPENDENCIES:
The code depends on the JobHistoryParser.JobInfo class and other classes in the same package.

---

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This code defines two static Comparators for sorting TaskAttemptInfo objects based on different criteria.

CORE LOGIC:
The first Comparator, cFinishMapRed, sorts TaskAttemptInfo objects based on their finish time in descending order.
The second Comparator, cReduce, sorts TaskAttemptInfo objects based on the difference between their finish time and shuffle finish time in descending order.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The code does not explicitly define any inputs or outputs.

DEPENDENCIES:
This code depends on the JobHistoryParser class and its TaskAttemptInfo class.
